sourceMovie.title: While You Were Sleeping
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: While You Were Sleeping (1995) stuck because it commits to its romance premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Jon Turteltaub's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The romance and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 27 Dresses
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If While You Were Sleeping clicked for you, 27 Dresses (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after While You Were Sleeping?
faq.answer: Try 27 Dresses, Last Christmas, Sleepless in Seattle—each shares DNA with While You Were Sleeping while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is While You Were Sleeping?
faq.answer: While You Were Sleeping (1995) is best described as Romance, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is While You Were Sleeping worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
